title: Mazars Comment Svb Is Not A Lehman Moment And Probably Wont Become One
section_path: Mazars Comment Svb Is Not A Lehman Moment And Probably Wont Become One
section_path_text: Mazars Comment Svb Is Not A Lehman Moment And Probably Wont Become One
summary:
S VB is not a Lehman moment, and probably won't become one. Summary
The US experienced the second biggest bank failure in its history on Friday when $209bn worth Silicon Valley Bank failed and was taken over by the regulator. However, despite the eerie echoes of 2008, we don't believe we are in a Lehman moment.

children.title: Summary
